title: Junior Revenue Manager at Air India SATS Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Air India SATS Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Air India SATS Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Air India SATS Global Group:
Air India SATS Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS Global Group!
